title: tephroseris elodes subsp. coincyi
intro: Tephroseris elodes subsp. coincyi, also known as the alpine hawk's beard or mountain fox-tail, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Tephroseris elodes subsp. coincyi are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions.
